title: Slimatrix
description: a silly little Slime mod i made for the basically content smp
body:
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7dfdacda7a99fd73e8aafe579554874e11efde1.png)A nice little Slime mod i made adding various items and features:

**big thank you to Hstar747 for making a couple of the textures :)**

it's going to be split into the light and dark side of the Slime
adds the folowing items:
- Slime Slammer:
a powerful weapon that acts like the mace and deals massive damage.
through clever engineering and the use of very good slime it launches you high up in the air after a strike and also feathers your fall.
- living slime:
  this slime has very interesting properties that it obtained through beeing exposed to large ammounts of heat (a campfire). thats how a normal slimeball turned into a live living structure called "the livingslime".
- nuf- and warriorcookie
i cooked!!!
- slime slicer
a powerful meele weapon inflicting slowness on hit
if you have a totem in your offhand and rightclick with the sword you can unlock its true power. and fuse the totem with the sword. if you now die while holding the sword the totem activates and saves you from certain death![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/700958ee0ec40ba2a3b964d06786a9ed70014646.png)
- slompass a new way of transport
  ![slompass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e32992e29e82f5408ea1ac16f347afaa66c15049.png)
- crafted with 4 living slime (corners), 2 netherite_scrap (left and right middle) and one compass (middle).
- shift right click to set a location
- right click anywhere to teleport there at the low cost of 5 hearts and 5 seconds of blindness
- 30 second cooldown
Heart Of Darkness
- applies darkness to your enemies
- might hit you with darkness
slimatrix/Atlantis Decoder
- sends you to a pocket dimension
- takes a couple seconds to teleport you
- !careful! if youre worldborder is too small you might bug out!
CodeBreaker
- hit someone to link
- once the linked person enters the slimatrix/atlantis you can teleport to them
pure evil
- crafting ingredient
Gladius Limus
- Lore weapon
- only craftable by Emjoel_Dad
- sends people to the shadow realm
- punishes unauthorised users
slime jar
- lets you capture/release mobs

-   also thanks Chemthunder for not suing me cuz i used your nufnaffcookie texture :)
